description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 11. Better current-task / suggested-response lifecycle management**.

Goal: refine task-state representation so primary goal, secondary pending items, waiting-for-user state, and assistant next-action guidance are distinct instead of blended together.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`

Worker notes:
- keep the representation small enough for prompt injection
- preserve the single-session model; this is not project-memory/task-tracker work
- make sure completed secondary tasks can remain visible without polluting the active block
title: Separate primary goal, secondary pending items, waiting state, and next-action guidance in OM state
